subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto them that have turned towards Him in the land named Farahán, that they may rejoice in the remembrance of God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن للذین اقبلوا الیه فی ارض سمیت بفراهان لیفرحوا بذکر الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement
